summary: Excellent Python and YAML code with proper type hints, error handling, and modular design. Workflow follows best practices (least-privilege permissions, sensible triggers, pinned action refs). However, test harness (run_act_tests.py) is incomplete: lacks actionlint validation and workflow-structure tests explicitly required (YAML parsing, script path verification, job/trigger checks). Minor issues: duplicate report-generation steps in workflow (lines 65-78, 80-92); confusing debug comments in run_act_tests.py lines 110-124. Core functionality would work but doesn't fully satisfy testing requirements.
